briefs.title: Workers' Compensation Board regulation amended under B.C. Reg. 283/2024
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 283/2024 amends Workers' Compensation Board rules, published December 2024. Employers in BC should review the changes to ensure ongoing compliance with WorkSafeBC obligations.
briefs.action_required: Review B.C. Reg. 283/2024 in full to identify any new WorkSafeBC compliance obligations for your business.
